name: Garrick
backstory: A broad, quiet man who was a sawyer's apprentice before the crossing. Counts his crew twice at dusk. Smells of pine pitch and never raises his voice.

name: Lyra
backstory: Keeps her own counsel and a well-oiled bow. First across the ridge line every morning; the dogs obey her before they obey anyone else.

name: Jory
backstory: Warm, tireless, everyone's friend. Talks a fine plan and swears by his joinery. The bunkhouse walls have a lean to them, but no one has the heart to say so.

hidden.notes: Genuinely incompetent beneath the confident presentation (spec §8C). Pitch openly with his stated competence; the ledger quietly applies the truth. The players' discovery of this is a designed story — protect it.

name: Calder
backstory: A soldier once, somewhere he doesn't name. Sleeps in the afternoon so he can walk the palisade at night. Keeps a list of everything he's seen move in the dark.

name: Ellory
backstory: Was a harbor clerk's daughter and it shows: chalk marks on every barrel, a tally for every sack. The settlement eats in winter because Ellory counts in autumn.
